cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 身分構造
cover.subtitle:
네 신분으로 나뉜 사회,
태어나면 정해진 자리.
cover.imagePrompt: Joseon folk minhwa + genre-painting tones. Hanji beige, ink-black, crimson, navy. Composition: a vertical four-tier scene from top to bottom — top, a yangban scholar in white dopo and black gat reading a book; second, a jungin technical official in lighter robe holding a brush; third, a sangmin peasant woman in hanbok carrying a basket; bottom, a cheonmin servant in plain clothes bowing. Soft horizontal hanji bands separate the tiers. Color: hanji beige + ink-black + crimson + navy. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 서얼차대법, 첩 자손 문과 응시 금지.
일천즉천 적용, 부모 한쪽이 노비면 노비.
사림 향촌 진출로 양반 지배 구조 강화.

items.name: 서얼
items.desc: 양반의 첩 자손, 문과 응시 불가.

items.title: 여성 호적
items.desc: 아들·딸 구분 없이 등재, 윤회 봉사.

outro.tip_headline:
"양천제 원칙, 실제는 사신분"
법과 현실을 묶을 것.
outro.tip_body: 심화에서는 법제상 양천제(양인·천민)와 실제 4신분(양반·중인·상민·천민)을 구분해야 한다. 일천즉천은 부모 중 한쪽이 노비면 자식도 노비.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: four stacked stylized silhouettes from top to bottom — a scholar with gat, an official with brush, a peasant with basket, a kneeling figure — separated by thin ink lines. Cream #F2EDE3 base + ink-black + crimson #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
